title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2026
summary:
Main
Today, iron ore futures on the Dalian Commodity Exchange opened lower but then rose, with the most-traded I2605contract closing at 750.5 yuan/mt, up 0.27% from the previous trading session. Spot prices increased by 2-3 yuan/mt compared to the previous trading day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in offering prices, while steel mills mainly purchased to restock, resulting in an overall moderate spot trading atmosphere.
